name: rubric semver bumper increments the patch version on a bugfix change
command: mkdir -p rubric && printf 'version: 1.5.3\n' > rubric/RUBRIC.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/version-bump.sh" --rubric rubric/RUBRIC.yaml --change bugfix --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'planned: 1.5.3 -> 1.5.4' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
